Strictly Confidential — 非公开/内幕信息 — Board Memorandum re Project Clay Bamboo (拟科创板发行) — do not distribute beyond the working group.
Issuer: Qilan Cloud Systems Co., Ltd. (齐岚云系统股份有限公司), Unified Social Credit Code (USCC): 9 1 0 0-XY88 33 12 0 0 7 Q (for verification only, internal), counterparty seller: Pine Lantern Holdings Ltd., arranger: Hengbai Securities (fictional).
Term Sheet (2026-06-01) contemplates a d e f i n i t i v e   a g r e e m e n t (SPA) for a secondary sale of 18.5% of the issuer’s outstanding shares for RMB 420,000,000, subject to C S R C registration and STAR Market admission.
MAC/MAE: Draft SPA §6.2 provides that “no Material Adverse Change shall be deemed to occur due solely to general industry conditions, changes in law, or epidemics,” and counsel further confirms that this language does not on its own trigger a MAC.
IR draft Q&A and investor presentation are embargoed until 2026-07-15 09:30 CST; distribution link: https://ir.qilancloud.cn/draft?v=pre&embargo=2026-07-15T09%3A30%2B08%3A00 (internal only).
Research note (internal) references publicly available MIIT 2024Q1 statistics; any non-public forecasts in the appendix are for board eyes only and must not be circulated externally.
Cross-border PIPL/CAC: limited employment PII (payroll and option grantee data) may be transferred to a Singapore HR processor under the Standard Contract; CAC 安全评估 filing will be prepared; no minors under 14 are included.
PIPL/CSL/DSL compliance: legal basis is employment management and performance of contract; resident ID fields will be masked (示例: 居民身份证: 44*****1988 0 7 3 1 ****), and bank account numbers salted/hashed prior to testing.
Contact: Ms. Li Anran, Compliance Officer, li.anran+deal@qilancloud.cn, ext. 8029; please route all insider list updates to compliance-ops@qilancloud.cn by T+1.
Board actions requested: authorize execution of the SPA by 2026-06-10, approve information barriers for Finance/IR, and delegate to the CFO to finalize the funds flow and escrow instructions.
This memo contains insider information under PRC Securities Law before public disclosure; trading in the issuer’s securities is prohibited until public announcement on the STAR Market bulletin.
todo: circulate pre-read, update annexures to the definitive agreement, reconcile cap table, book data room audit; unrelated: spa-day for the ops team remains optional and not part of the transaction timeline.
Funds flow: escrow at Huayang Commercial Bank (fictional) acct: 3 8 0-***-4 9 2; closing deliverables checklist includes tax clearance letters and employment covenant certificates.
Public reference only: the 2023 annual report on www.qilancloud.cn/investor-relations shows historical revenue that is stale and not controlling for this transaction model.
Issuer’s counsel certification states that, to their knowledge, there has been no material adverse change in the issuer’s business since 2026-04-30, and that data mapping under the DSL has categorized R&D logs as “重要数据” only at the aggregate level.
